title: Chief Technology Officer (IT)
description:
X Star is a Singapore-based AI innovator transforming the automotive finance industry. Since our founding in 2023, we have expanded our operational footprint across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East.

We leverage proprietary artificial intelligence to provide consumers with cutting-edge financial services while delivering powerful technology solutions that enhance value for our partners. Our global network now includes over 2,000 car manufacturers, dealers, and financial institutions.

Backed by a dedicated team of 200 professionals and a financing facility of $150 million as of H1 2025, X Star is accelerating its global expansion to bring intelligent, seamless mobility solutions to a worldwide consumer base.

Headquartered in Singapore, X Star operates across key markets, including Japan and Mexico. Our Singapore business alone has facilitated over SGD 100 million in cumulative loans, demonstrating strong market traction and scalability. As a result of continuous growth of business, we are looking for an experienced Chief Technology Officer (IT) to join us and play a critical role in shaping our future success.

Key Responsibilities

Strategic Leadership

Define and implement the company’s IT vision and roadmap.

Align technology initiatives with overall business goals.

Identify opportunities for digital transformation and innovation.


Technology Management

Oversee IT infrastructure, applications, and enterprise systems.

Ensure high availability, scalability, and performance of technology platforms.

Evaluate and adopt emerging technologies to maintain competitive advantage.


Cybersecurity & Compliance

Establish and enforce robust cybersecurity policies and practices.

Ensure compliance with industry regulations and data protection standards.

Manage risk assessments and disaster recovery planning.


Team Leadership

Build, mentor, and lead a high-performing IT team.

Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement.

Manage vendor relationships and technology partnerships.


Operational Excellence

Optimize IT processes for efficiency and cost-effectiveness.

Implement best practices in IT service management.

Monitor KPIs and report on IT performance to executive leadership.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
  • Proven experience (10+ years) in IT leadership roles, with at least 5 years in a senior executive position.
  • Strong knowledge of enterprise IT systems, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and software development.
  • Demonstrated ability to align technology with business strategy.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

postedCompany.description: Yi Star is a wholly-owned subsidiary of HK-Listed Yixin Group to expand the Group's footprints in Automotive, Mobility, Media and Technology to capture new growth opportunities in the APAC region.
postedCompany.name: X STAR TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
